titleStmt.title: SII 24.27: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 27. (A.R. No. 112 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Much damaged. Begins with the introduction Pugaḻ śūḻnda puṇari of the king. Registers gift of land by Arumoḻi Rājādhirājaṉ alias Vāṇādhirājar for rearing a flower garden.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil poṉṉemiyaḷavuṉ taṉ nemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamaka ruvattu cak karakoṭṭattu vikkiramat to vayirākarattu vāri ḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭi
yaiy niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait ten maru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum tannilap tavira vantu puṉitaṟ tirumaṇimakuṭam cūṭi taṉṉaṭiyiraṇṭu laventar cūṭa ma kol ticai toṟuñ cella
ntaṉātu tirunila veṇṇilāttikaḻa Orutanimeruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟṟipān tarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭu kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟppa vilaṅku piṟkkulap piṟai po koṭiṟṟallatu ṭā vikkala kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇ
tturatti veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭataṉ māṉamuṅ kūṟiṉa viramum kiṭappa kaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta ṉati ḷun talaiviri tāṟaiyām yaṉinir
jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻiṉ celviyum pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅkoḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷa ttaraṅkamum parikkuvaikaḷun tantiravāriyu
vantu vaṭakaṭalteṉkaṭal paṭarvatu polat taṉ peruñceṉai p pañcavar Aiyvarum poruta porkkaḷattañca ṭiyaraṇenap pukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu peṟṟavar tammai koṟṟa vijaiyastampam ticaitoṟum ṉiṟuttu muttiṉ calāpamum muttamiḻ ppotiyilum mattaveṅkarippaṭu maiyyaic
nta caik koṇṭaruḷit teṉnāṭṭe kaṭalmalaināṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellām taṉi vicumpeṟa lavaraik kuṟukalar neṟi toṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiṟaikoḷa viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyā
poliyum paḻantiyākamum mevalar vi viṟṟi rājakeśari panma vaṟkku śrīkāriyañceykiṟa Iḻakkantiṟattu caṅkara nārāyaṇa paṭṭar ciyum (varakāla)ceṇpaka nārāya—
vāyppāṭina kkamaṅkalattu yaṉum śrīvilliputtūr dāca yaccaruppeti revadāsarum Ārāvamutum Āritaṉ muṭaiyāṉum ṉum Āritaṉ cen
pāra cirāmaṉum śrīvayiṣṇavar kaṇakku veṅkaṭa muṭaiyāṉum sabhaikkaṇakku periya ruka Ivvaṉaivom Arumo vāṇādhirāyarkku Aṭaiyolai tiṭṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu . Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyār tevatānamāna keraḷānta ttūr nāṭṭukkā ṭiyil kāverikkulai Uṭaintu ma
ṇaliṭa yyavuṇṇāte nūṟusamvatsarattin ppāḻākkiṭanta nilam tiruttip payir � caippaṭi veliyāl Eṇkala key koṭuvantu paṇṭārakkālāl paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāley Aḷakka kkaṭavarākavum Inṉilaṉ koṇṭu payir ceytu Aṉubhavittu Onṟarai nilattāl vanta �
Aṭuttuk kuṭutta nilattukku kīḻpāṟke nilam Aṟumāvukku meṟkum m tevamacakkalukkum ku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai kaṇat- tār kkum vaṭapāṟkellai maṇṇi ti kellaiyuḷḷun naṭuvuḷpaṭṭanilan
Oṉṟarai Iṉnilam Onṟaraiyum kaiykkoṇṭu kāśyapan paḷḷikoṇṭānāna Aḻakiya maṇavāḷadāsar vāṇādhirāyarkkākac ceykiṟa pukaḻālaiyan taṇṭunaṟṟamāḷ muvarkku Oruvanukku nellukkuṟuṇi yā veṇṭu nellu toṇṇūṟṟukkalamum Eṅkaḷukku mutal Oruvanukku kācu Iraṇṭāka muvaṟkku kācu Āṟu Āka Inṉilam Onṟaraiyum tirutti
payir ceyta nilattāl puncey varicai veli Eṇkala Aḷakkakaṭava nākavum Iṉnilattil mikuti koṇṭu Ittirunantavāṉam pukaḻālaiyan ceyvāṟkku Ikkācum nellum Iṭṭu ceyvikka kaṭavarākavum Ippuncey varicai Allatu tiruvācalil ponta ḷakkuṭimaiyum Etuvum ceyakkaṭavar Allātārākavum Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ niṟka kaṭavatāka Aṭuttukkuṭut tom Arumoḻi Irājādhirājan Āna vāṇādhirājaṟkkum
Āḻvār kaṉmikaḷom Itu śrī vaiyiṣṇavarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
